nasb.text: They will all respond and say to you, ‘Even you have been made weak as we, You have become like us.

esv.text: All of them will answer and say to you: ‘You too have become as weak as we! You have become like us!’

cnv.text: 他們都必答話，對你說： ‘你也變為衰弱，像我們一樣嗎？ 你也與我們相似嗎？’

ccb.text: 对你说， ‘你如今也跟我们一样软弱无能。’

csbs.text: 他们都必回应，对你说： ‘你竟然像我们一样变得软弱无能， 与我们相似了！’
